items.message: User priority explicitly set: (1) make money first, (2) everything else second; requested rapid revenue-engine deployment and accepted broad skills installation/testing.
Telegram channel was connected and pairing approved for user id `1401224993` on profile `ocdev`; trading coordination moved into direct Telegram chat.
SkillsMP/ClawHub installs completed for broad trading stack:

Previously installed: `polymarket-copytrading`, `polymarket-ai-divergence`, `polymarket-fast-loop`, `polymarket-mert-sniper`, `polymarket-signal-sniper`, `polymarket-weather-trader`, `prediction-trade-journal`, `trading-research`, `ccxt`, `simmer-x402`, plus ops/security skills.
Additional installs this session: `polymarket-autotrader`, `polymarket-scout`, `funding-rate-trader`, `kalshi-trading`, and later `polymarket-wallet-xray` (after retry).
User requested weather-trader specifically; confirmed installed and available.
Key infrastructure recovery:
Identified `freeopenclawtrader.com` pipeline via Vercel project `ticker-site` and GitHub repo `richducat/ticker-site`.
Discovered old updater depended on machine-local simmer creds path; patched to env-based auth and added scheduled GitHub workflow.
Also restored live site behavior by routing `ticker-site` traffic back to `api.freeopenclawtrader.com` to match historical working setup.
Simmer dashboard findings and live-trading blockers resolved/diagnosed:
Agent wallet now READY, Simmer-managed wallet active (`0x42bFb8E89FF7d8e5a7a93F59a8FbCa93403Ced71`).
Major blocker observed: managed wallet had POL gas but 0 USDC.e at one point; later funds available after position closing.
Persistent backend setting issue observed repeatedly: effective limits still behaved as `max_trades_per_day=1` and `max_position_usd=1.0` despite attempted UI/API changes.
Trading actions executed:
Copytrading was run live in some passes (including successful executions in sim/live contexts depending on venue path).
Open polymarket positions were force-closed on user request; state reached 0 open positions with freed USDC balance (~$15.69 reported).
Attempted redeploy into BTC lane hit cooldown and/or platform limits in several runs.
Best-performing historical lane identified from trade history: copytrading on **Bitcoin Up/Down (mostly NO)**.
Queried trade history for source `sdk:copytrading` + market text containing “Bitcoin Up or Down”.
Found 13 entries, 4 filled trades, 9 zero-share attempts; filled notional around $13.1491.
User asked for unattended reliability so trading does not stall when user is away; agreed direction:
implement execution reliability layer (preflight settings sync, wallet readiness checks, cooldown-aware routing, retry/failsafe logic).
User began sharing a 12-strategy “agent hedge fund” screenshot/prompt set; all images were received and acknowledged as basis for multi-agent orchestration design.
